channel.title: Signal on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Signal on Arrans github.io

item.title: gommzystudio/device-activity-tracker
item.description: A phone number can reveal whether a device is active, in standby or offline (and more). This PoC demonstrates how delivery receipts + RTT timing leak sensitive device-activity patterns. (WhatsApp / Signal)

item.title: gummipunkt/signalcow
item.description: This project provides a web-based platform to manage and interact with a Signal bot. It allows users to register, create groups that correspond to Signal groups, and configure webhooks to send messages to these groups via a REST API.
